name: tall-multiplayer-depth-wall
description: Verify the excavation wall is doubled to six player-scale rows while retaining dense contiguous 4x4x4 cubes and the expected bounded block count.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local f=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks'] local total=#f:GetChildren() local xs,ys,l1={}, {},0 local collidable,cubes=0,0 for _,b in ipairs(f:GetChildren()) do if b.CanCollide then collidable+=1 end if math.abs(b.Size.X-4)<.01 and math.abs(b.Size.Y-4)<.01 and math.abs(b.Size.Z-4)<.01 then cubes+=1 end if b:GetAttribute('Depth')==1 then l1+=1 xs[math.floor(b.Position.X*100+.5)/100]=true ys[math.floor(b.Position.Y*100+.5)/100]=true end end local xc,yc=0,0 for _ in pairs(xs) do xc+=1 end for _ in pairs(ys) do yc+=1 end return H:JSONEncode({ok=total==5400 and collidable==5400 and cubes==5400 and l1==72 and xc==12 and yc==6 and workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetAttribute('DepthBlockCount')==5400,total=total,collidable=collidable,cubes=cubes,layerOne=l1,columns=xc,rows=yc,blockSize=tostring(workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetAttribute('DepthBlockSize'))})
